title: Complete a public booking from service selection to confirmation
description: A customer can book an appointment on the public booking page by selecting a service and time, entering contact details, and confirming the appointment.

steps.description: Fill in the contact information fields
Verify a booking confirmation is displayed
Verify the booked appointment is shown in the success state

title: Enter the dashboard through demo login
description: A user can submit the login form and land in the dashboard experience without needing real authentication.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Open an appointment and update its status
description: A scheduler can open an appointment from the dashboard and change its status from the detail drawer. Available statuses are 'Rezerve' (booked), 'Geldi' (arrived), 'Tamamlandı' (completed), 'Gelmedi' (no-show) — there is intentionally no separate 'confirmed' status.

steps.description: Open an appointment from the appointments list

In the detail drawer, change the appointment status using one of the available status actions (for example mark it as completed / 'Tamamlandı'). Do NOT look for a 'confirmed' or 'Onaylandı' option — it does not exist by design.
Verify the appointment detail drawer remains visible
Verify the updated appointment status (e.g. 'Tamamlandı') is reflected in the drawer or list

title: Book an appointment through the public booking flow
description: This test verifies that a customer can complete the public booking journey from service selection through confirmation.

steps.description: Fill in the customer name field with a unique name
Fill in the customer phone field with a valid phone number
Verify a booking confirmation screen is visible
Verify the appointment is shown as confirmed

title: Switch landing page language and reach auth entry points
description: A visitor can switch between TR and EN on the landing page, review the booking/demo area, and navigate to login or signup from the marketing page.

steps.description: Scroll through the landing page sections
Interact with the booking widget demo
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the signup screen is displayed

title: Use demo access from the login screen
description: A user can enter the dashboard directly from the login screen using the demo access path.

title: Enter the dashboard through demo signup and onboarding
description: A user submits the signup form, is routed to the 3-step onboarding (by design), completes it, and lands in the dashboard.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the onboarding page is displayed (heading like 'İşletmeni tanıtalım', URL /onboarding) — this is the expected post-signup destination
Step 1: fill the business name field (e.g. 'Test Salon'); the slug auto-fills. Click 'Devam et'
Step 2: select a business category from the grid (e.g. 'Berber'). Click 'Devam et'
Step 3: click the final confirmation button to finish onboarding

title: Review the dashboard overview and schedule
description: A dashboard user can review the core workspace including summary metrics, schedule visibility, revenue trends, and alerts.

steps.description: Verify the schedule grid and upcoming alerts are displayed

title: Choose any available staff member for booking
description: This test verifies that a customer can continue booking by choosing any available staff member when no specific provider is required.

steps.description: Choose any available staff member option
Fill in the customer name field with a unique name
Fill in the customer phone field with a valid phone number
Verify a booking confirmation screen is visible

title: Open checkout initiation from pricing on the landing page
description: A visitor can click a pricing call to action on the marketing page and begin the checkout flow.

steps.description: Click a pricing call to action
Verify a checkout initiation is displayed

title: Add a new service to the catalog
description: This verifies that a user can create a service with duration, price, and color and see it appear in the service list.

steps.description: Fill in the service name with a unique value
Fill in a valid duration for the service
Fill in a valid price for the service
Verify the new service appears in the list

title: Add and edit a service with scheduling details
description: A service manager can create or update a service with duration, price, and color and see it reflected in the services workspace.

steps.description: Verify the service appears in the services list
Verify the updated service details are reflected

title: Update business profile information
description: This verifies that a user can edit business profile details and see the updated information reflected in settings.

steps.description: Edit the business profile name field with a new business name
Edit the business profile contact field with a new contact value
Verify the updated business profile information is displayed
Verify a saved changes confirmation is visible

title: Add and edit a staff member with working hours
description: A staff manager can create or update a staff profile with working hours and see it reflected in the staff workspace.

steps.description: Fill in the staff details and working hours
Edit the newly created staff member
Update the staff details and working hours
Verify the staff member appears in the staff list
Verify the updated working hours are reflected

title: Browse the calendar and inspect an appointment
description: This verifies that a user can open the calendar, switch the viewed date, and inspect appointment blocks and details.

steps.description: Verify appointment blocks are displayed for staff members

title: Move between workspace sections from the dashboard sidebar
description: A dashboard user can use the sidebar to reach calendar, clients, services, staff, booking, and settings sections.

steps.description: Open the calendar section from the sidebar
Open the clients section from the sidebar
Open the services section from the sidebar
Open the staff section from the sidebar
Open the booking section from the sidebar
Open the settings section from the sidebar
Verify each corresponding section is displayed during navigation

title: Edit an existing service and keep changes visible
description: This verifies that a user can update an existing service and see the revised service information in the list.

steps.description: Select an existing service for editing
Verify the updated service appears in the list

title: Review business settings and integration status
description: This verifies that a user can open settings and review the business profile and integration status panels successfully.

steps.description: Verify the business profile section is displayed
Verify the integration status section is displayed

title: Open a client record from the directory
description: This verifies that a user can browse or search clients and open a client profile to review contact information and visit history.

steps.description: Browse or search the client list
Verify client contact information is displayed

title: Update an existing staff member
description: This test verifies that a manager can edit an existing staff member's details and working hours and see the updated information in the list.

steps.description: Open the edit form for the selected staff member
Change the staff details to a new valid value
Update the working hours to a valid schedule
Verify the staff list shows the updated staff information
Verify the updated working hours are visible

title: Preview the public booking page and copy the booking link
description: An admin can preview the public booking page from the dashboard and use the booking link control to copy the shareable link.

steps.description: Open the booking preview section from the sidebar
Verify the booking preview is displayed
Verify a copy confirmation is visible

title: Search clients and open a client detail view
description: A client manager can find a client in the list and open the client detail view to review their record.

steps.description: Verify the filtered client list is displayed
Verify the client detail view is displayed

title: Preview the public booking page from the dashboard
description: This test verifies that an admin can open the booking preview and review the public booking experience before sharing it.

steps.description: Verify the public booking page preview is displayed
Verify the booking experience layout is visible

title: View the calendar schedule by staff and time
description: This verifies that the calendar day view shows scheduled appointment blocks organized by staff members and time slots.

steps.description: Verify time-based appointment blocks are displayed

title: Switch the dashboard language while reviewing workspace content
description: A bilingual user can switch the dashboard language between TR and EN without losing access to the workspace view.

steps.description: Toggle the language back to Turkish
Verify the dashboard workspace remains displayed
Verify the language change is reflected in the interface

title: Copy the public booking link
description: This test verifies that an admin can copy the shareable booking link from the booking preview page and receive confirmation feedback.

steps.description: Verify a copy confirmation is visible
Verify the booking link remains available on the page

title: Search clients and open the matching record
description: This verifies that a user can search the client directory and open a matching client profile from the filtered results.

steps.description: Verify the selected client profile is displayed
Verify the client's visit history is displayed

title: Use AI search from the dashboard
description: This verifies that a dashboard user can submit a query in AI search and receive an assistant response.

steps.description: Type a query into the AI search field
Verify an assistant response is displayed
Verify the submitted query is reflected in the conversation

title: Switch between calendar dates without losing the schedule view
description: This verifies that a user can change the displayed calendar date and still see appointment blocks for the selected day.

steps.description: Verify the schedule updates for the selected date

title: Change settings plan or language option
description: This verifies that a user can change the displayed settings option and see the selection update.

steps.description: Change the displayed plan or language option
Verify the selected option is updated
Verify the settings view reflects the new selection

title: Prevent booking submission without required contact details
description: This test verifies that the booking form requires contact information before confirming an appointment and displays validation feedback.

steps.description: Verify a contact validation error is visible
Verify the booking is not confirmed

title: Review dashboard AI search empty and ready state
description: This verifies that the dashboard AI search entry point is available and ready for queries without requiring prior interaction.

steps.description: Verify the AI search entry point is displayed
Verify the dashboard workspace is displayed

title: Show unavailable times as non-selectable during booking
description: This test verifies that the booking flow prevents customers from selecting unavailable time slots and only allows valid appointment times.

steps.description: Review the displayed time slots — booked (unavailable) times render greyed-out with line-through styling and a disabled attribute (e.g. 10:00, 12:00, 15:00)
Verify the booked time slots are disabled and cannot be selected (clicking them does not highlight them)
Verify at least one available time slot can be selected

title: Handle an empty service form submission
description: This verifies that the service form prevents saving when required details are missing and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Submit the form without filling required fields
Verify the service is not added to the list

title: Reject an invalid staff form submission
description: This test verifies that the staff form blocks saving when required staff details are incomplete or invalid and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Start adding a new staff member
Leave a required staff detail empty
Attempt to save the staff member
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the staff member is not added to the list

title: Show an empty state when a fresh workspace has no staff
description: This test verifies that a brand-new (fresh) workspace — created via signup and onboarding — shows an empty state on the staff page, since fresh workspaces start with zero staff. NOTE: the demo session always seeds 4 staff members; the empty state is only reachable in a fresh workspace.

steps.description: Navigate to /signup and submit the form (demo bypass — any values work)
On /onboarding step 1, enter business name 'Bos Salon' and click 'Devam et'
On step 2, select a category (e.g. 'Berber') and click 'Devam et'
On step 3, click the finish button to enter the dashboard
Verify the empty state message 'Henüz personel yok' is visible
Verify no staff cards are shown and an 'İlk personelini ekle' button is offered
